inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakan mehsoos kar rahi hoon, sir bhi dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache and fatigue can also be symptoms of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid typically presents with more severe symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz ki samasya bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are characteristic symptoms of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation can also occur in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever typically does not present with such severe abdominal symptoms

inputs.text: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast aur bahut weakness mehsoos ho rahi hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Diarrhea after constipation, high fever, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: While gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, the combination of these symptoms suggests typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclical fever and chills, not seen here

inputs.text: Main bahut thak gayi hoon, bukhar abhi bhi hai aur pet dard bhi badh gaya hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription and blood test report shown

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Confirmation of typhoid through blood tests and clinical presentation

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of response to treatment and persistent symptoms indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to negative blood tests and clinical presentation not consistent with malaria
